content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1550: A New Original Symbol!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

“What’s are your conditions?”

Judy pulled a stern face and calmly looked at Shi Yan, waiting for his requests.

The Absolute Beginning Original Symbol was extremely important to experts at their realm!

An Original Symbol could help them see the most essence of their power Upanishad and provide them with a supernatural ability. Having an Original Symbol helped them enter a brand new realm.

Whether it was Judy or Han Tian, they had a big desire for the Original Symbol. As Shi Yan agreed to offer conditions with them, they considered it as a positive sign already.

Because Shi Yan had more choices, he could choose the White Bone Clan, the Phantom Clan, or other races.

However, they didn’t have more choices. Only Shi Yan had the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. Moreover, with his and Zi Yao’s current competence, they couldn’t rob them.

Thus, they had to negotiate with him.

Shi Yan gave Zi Yao a look. She smiled, nodded, and said to Judy, “The condition is to help me find the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal. I think you know these two kinds of crystals. The Mysterious Sky Clan should have some, I assume. Or you at least know where to find them.”

Listening to her, Han Tian and Judy looked surprised. It seemed like it was a hard matter for them.

They of course knew the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal. They also knew how rare the crystals were. Judy and Han Tian had a few of them that they didn’t dare to use.

The Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal had special effects on Zi Yao. They could recover her power.

Before Zi Yao got hurt, she was at the Peak of Territory Ancestor Realm. Just like Devour and Desolate, they were pretty close to the ultimate realm. However, after the tragic war in the Absolute Beginning Era, Zi Yao, Devour, and Desolate got wounded severely. They had to stay dormant to recover.

If Shi Yan hadn’t disturbed her and awakened her in the chaotic space basin, she would have needed dozens of thousands of years to accumulate her energy to the level she once had that year.

The Absolute Beginning creatures needed a lot of time to absorb earth and heaven energy to recover.

This process would have taken ten to dozens of thousands of years. If the wounds were serious, it could take millions of years.

Apparently, Zi Yao couldn’t wait for such a long period because Desolate was awakened. Also, Yuan Zu was still alive. Devour was using the Devouring Clan to recover himself.

If the Absolute Beginning creatures wanted to recover quickly, they had a shortcut, which was to find the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal.

Both the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal weren’t made naturally. They were extremely rare and of course, very precious.

The Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal was actually the blood crystallization. After the Absolute Beginning creatures died and shed blood, their blood accumulated. After so many years with earth and heaven energy supplement, the crystals would be slowly produced.

The Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal was crystallized from Absolute Beginning creature’s blood and a large amount of energy. It could recover the wounded Absolute Beginning creatures fast and regrow their blood and flesh.

The Dark Energy Crystal was a strange crystal created from broken soul altars of warriors at the Territory Ancestor Realm. If their soul ponds weren’t destroyed after a long time, it would crystallize. The Dark Energy Crystal was used to advance the soul energy of the experts at Territory Ancestor Realm.

The Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal improved the body and the Dark Energy Crystal increased the soul energy. They were the precious and most effective treasures to help Zi Yao recover quickly.

Both of them weren’t naturally made. They were really valuable to the Seven Great Clans. Han Tian and Judy had used an enormous amount force of the Mysterious Sky Clan to search and accumulate a small amount. However, they didn’t dare to use them.

They wanted to use it for the new Territory Ancestors, the foundation of the Mysterious Sky Clan’s future.

If Zi Yao asked for something else, they would have agreed immediately. However, to the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal, they became hesitant.

The Original Symbol, the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal, and the Dark Energy Crystal... the former could advance their power Upanishads and the latter could create more chances for their later generation. They had to weigh them hard to make a decision.

“I know the Mysterious Sky Clan knows many vestiges of the Absolute Beginning Era. Okay, tell me the locations. I’ll go there to check myself,” said Zi Yao.

Battles happened almost everywhere in the Absolute Beginning Era. Many creatures were killed. Perhaps, the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal were somewhere. After a long time, the battlefields had drifted to other corners of the universe. Zi Yao didn’t know where to find them. Perhaps, only strong forces like the Seven Great Clans could know.

“No problem. We do know a lot of Absolute Beginning vestiges. Many of them have terrifying seals and barriers that we don’t dare to intrude. We can show you the way,” Judy said immediately. “We will take you guys there to see.”

“Not us. Only her.” Shi Yan smiled, “I have something more important to do.”

Pondering for a while, he said, “There’s a shortcut to refine an Original Symbol. If you can find enough strong creatures for me to kill and swallow its energy, I can use the abundant energy to refine an Original Symbol. For example, after Neptune, Keith, and Labitte were killed, I made a Space Original Symbol...”

Han Tian and Judy were shaken. “Neptune and the others were killed? You killed them?”

Neptune, Keith, and Oliver were the Territory Ancestors of the Seven Clans. In each clan, they were extremely strong. As they disappeared mysteriously, the Soul Clan, the Ancient Monster Clan, the Black Demon Clan, and the Devouring Clan couldn’t be safe.

Previously, Han Tian and Judy were bewildered about this. They tried to guess where the others had gone.

And now, Shi Yan just exposed the truth. They knew that the others were killed and became Shi Yan’s new Original Symbol, another chance to help Shi Yan understand his power Upanishad better. How could they not be scared?

Shi Yan smiled at Zi Yao as the others were looking at him with frightened eyes. “As we’ve discussed, we’ll part now. You go with Han Tian and Judy to find the Absolute Beginning Blood Crystal and the Dark Energy Crystal. I... am going to increase my power. Oh, right, I promised the Heavenly Eye Clan that once I reach the Territory Ancestor Realm, I will take a member of the Heavenly Eye Clan as my disciple. I don’t have enough time to do that. You help me with this. Let Xiao Lie and Jia Ni do it on behalf of me...”

He smiled and noted Zi Yao.

While talking, he urged his Space power Upanishad. The Space power Upanishad appeared like a mirror with a brilliant door. It was the supernatural ability called “Shuttle”!

Swish! Swish! Swish!

Billions of space light rays congregated in front of him and became a territory gateway. This gateway could lead to different territories, facilitating him to travel easily between big territories.

From now on, in this infinite sea of stars, the Sea Domain of Nihility and the major territories weren’t a significant distance in his eyes.

He could create space doors and move between territories easily. He could appear in every corner of the Sea Domain of Nihility.

As Han Tian and Judy were watching him, he smiled and walked through the door. Finally, he disappeared from the Musing Rain territory of the Heavenly Eye Clan.

“He’s not far from Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. The power and aura he has just shown aren’t less than a normal Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm.” He watched Shi Yan disappear into the light gateway, his face terrified. “His realm isn’t lower than Bloodthirsty that year. Perhaps, he’s even stronger than Bloodthirsty in some aspects.”

“Bloodthirsty?” Zi Yao sneered, “He was a fierce warrior. It’s just bad that he couldn’t refine an Absolute Beginning body. He was just cannon fodder in the war between Devour and Desolate. Because of the soul restriction, he could never reach Shi Yan’s height.”

She thought that Shi Yan today had already surpassed Bloodthirsty.

“Xiao Lie, Jia Ni, you two can choose a disciple each and teach them carefully,” she asked faintly.

The strange, cyan snake on Xiao Lie’s of the Heavenly Craftsmen Clan and Jia Ni of the Secret Pattern Tribe glowed. They bowed and showed their willingness.

Judy contemplated for a while and then sent a soul message to the area outside the ravine.

Outside the ravine, Tu Shi Qi and Ya Yun of the Mysterious Sky Clan were startled. Ya Yun had strange light in her eyes as she walked to Cornet. “The higher authority agrees that your Heavenly Eye Clan will become the closet race to the Mysterious Sky Clan. You will replace the position of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe. From now on, you can contact the Mysterious Sky Clan directly. Here, it’s your token. You can go to the Mysterious Sky Clan’s headquarters and visit the library to read the secret books about power Upanishads. You can also ask and learn from our elders.”

She handed him an ancient-style token.

Cornet held the token and continuously thanked her. He was so excited that he shivered.

Yvelines and Adams understood that Han Tian and Judy must have had some agreement with Shi Yan inside that ravine. Because of Shi Yan and Zi Yao, the Mysterious Sky Clan had upgraded the Heavenly Eye Clan’s echelon.

That small token meant that the Heavenly Eye Clan would become a core member of the Mysterious Sky Clan. From now on, the members of the Heavenly Eye Clan could talk directly to the Mysterious Sky Clan and visit them to learn strong power Upanishads of the Mysterious Sky Clan. They could even ask the elders to teach them. Just a moment ago, all of these favors were unimaginable to them.

The Heavenly Eye Clan would thrive with this foundation. In the next ten thousand years, the Heavenly Eye Clan would grow quickly and continuously.

“I am Xiao Lie. I’m searching for a disciple among the fellows of the Heavenly Eye Clan. On behalf of Shi Yan, I will teach that fellow to fulfill Shi Yan’s promise to your clan.”

“You can’t cultivate my power Upanishad but I have a great enough understanding of power Upanishads to teach you guys. I will choose one disciple too. I will teach you the essence of powers,” said Jia Ni.

They walked out of the ravine and stood in front of the Mysterious Sky Clan and the Heavenly Eye Clan to find a suitable apprentice.

Yvelines, Adams, and Masha were thrilled. They kneeled down and bowed towards the ravine to show their gratitude to Shi Yan.

Unfortunately, they didn’t know that Shi Yan had left the ravine and disappeared from this territory.
